Make transfers without borders!

Transfer funds instantly across Kyrgyzstan and worldwide — easily, securely, and in just a few taps

Money transfer systems

RIA Money Transfer

One of the world’s leading money transfer systems, operating in more than 160 countries. Receive funds quickly without opening an account — simply present an ID and provide the transfer reference number.

Fees and terms

Detailed information on transfer fees and terms is available in the bank’s official tariff document.
